codeReview.summary: The fix fully addresses the prior blocking gap by expanding meal visibility from two metrics to glucose plus all nutrition-category metrics via getMetricsByCategory("nutrition"), while keeping non-meal mappings unchanged and adding targeted coverage.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill requires test-first TDD with an initial failing run, but this fix session edited implementation before test edits and did not record a failing test run, while handoff skillFeedback still reports followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md:36 requires "Write tests first (TDD)"; worker-transcripts.jsonl (session 1e3a5163-cb4b-4c0f-8f3a-8a6027de2bbd) shows Edit on src/lib/dashboard/annotations.ts before Edit on src/lib/dashboard/__tests__/annotations.test.ts, and only passing test executions are recorded.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission AGENTS guidance says existing test files must not be modified, but this fix feature explicitly requires updating tests and correctly does so. This rule appears overly broad/ambiguous for fix features.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/weae1504/.factory/missions/db9d835a-f2b6-43c1-b3f9-be45e7a2a25a/AGENTS.md:16 says "Do NOT modify existing test files"; features.json lines 744-753 for fix-meal-annotation-mapping explicitly require updating tests and verified behavior.

summary: Pass: the fix resolves the original annotation-merge-service failure by making meal annotation visibility align with LLD §9.2 (glucose + all nutrition metrics), and added tests confirm both direct visibility checks and merged-annotation filtering behavior for nutrition-granted viewers.
